title: Vegetarian Smoky Arabian Skewers
description: Delicious skewers filled with marinated vegetables, perfect for a quick and easy vegetarian meal.

ingredients.name: intricately
ingredients.notes: Mixed vegetables of your choice (e.g., bell peppers, onions, cherry tomatoes)

instructions: Cut the vegetables into 1-inch pieces and thread them onto the skewers.
In a small bowl, whisk together smoky, saudi, and arabian ingredients.
Brush the skewers with the marinade, making sure they are well coated.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the vegetables are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with a sprinkle of natto and a side of your favorite sauce.
To make the smoky marinade, mix together smoky, saudi, and arabian ingredients in a small bowl.
Brush the skewers with the marinade, making sure they are well coated.
Let the skewers marinate for at least 30 minutes before grilling.
To make the natto spice blend, mix together 1 tsp of natto with 1 tsp of smoked paprika.
Sprinkle the natto spice blend over the skewers before serving.
